title: helenium nervosum
intro: Helenium nervosum, also known as Stinking Willy or False Helenium, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Helenium nervosum include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and easing symptoms of respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Helenium nervosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
